questions.question: What does (epsilon, delta)-differential privacy guarantee for a randomized algorithm M?
options: M does not memorize any training data ever
M is deterministic up to noise
For any two datasets differing in one example and any event S, P(M(D) in S) <= e^epsilon * P(M(D') in S) + delta, so any single individual's contribution cannot be reliably inferred
M is provably equivalent to a non-private algorithm
questions.question_zh: 对于随机算法 M，(epsilon, delta)-differential privacy 提供了什么保证？
options_zh: M 永远不会记忆任何训练数据
M 除噪声外是确定性的
对任意只相差一个样本的两个数据集 D 和 D'，以及任意事件 S：P(M(D) ∈ S) ≤ e^epsilon · P(M(D') ∈ S) + delta，使得任何单个个体的贡献都无法被可靠地推断出来
M 可证明等价于一个非私有算法

questions.question: Which is NOT a step of DP-SGD as described by Abadi et al. 2016?
options: Sample a mini-batch and compute per-example gradients
Clip each per-example gradient to a threshold C
Re-randomize the model's tokenizer between steps
Sum clipped gradients and add Gaussian noise scaled by sigma * C
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一步 不是 Abadi et al. 2016 描述的 DP-SGD 的步骤？
options_zh: 采样一个 mini-batch 并计算 per-example 梯度
把每个 per-example 梯度裁剪到阈值 C
在每一步之间重新随机化模型的 tokenizer
对裁剪后的梯度求和并加入按 sigma · C 缩放的高斯噪声

questions.question: Why is LoRA + DP-SGD the common 2025 configuration?
options: Full DP-SGD on a frontier model is prohibitive; LoRA limits gradient updates to a small adapter, reducing per-example gradient storage while still providing DP guarantees on the adapter
It uses LoRA as a tokenizer
LoRA increases epsilon by design
LoRA removes the need for an accountant
questions.question_zh: 为什么 LoRA + DP-SGD 是 2025 年常见的配置？
options_zh: 对前沿模型做完整 DP-SGD 代价过高；LoRA 把梯度更新限制在一个小的 adapter 上，降低了 per-example 梯度的存储开销，同时仍然能在 adapter 上提供 DP 保证
因为它把 LoRA 用作 tokenizer
因为 LoRA 在设计上会增大 epsilon
因为 LoRA 让 accountant 变得不再必要

questions.question: How did the March 2025 audit (arXiv:2503.06808) resolve the canary-MIA vs training-data-extraction tension?
options: It eliminated the need for canaries entirely
It proved DP-SGD is unnecessary
It showed both measure the same property
It showed they measure different things: MIA on inserted canaries under-reports memorization because canaries are not optimized to be the 'most extractable' examples that actually matter for privacy
questions.question_zh: 2025 年 3 月的审计（arXiv:2503.06808）如何化解 canary-MIA 与训练数据抽取之间的张力？
options_zh: 完全不再需要 canary
证明 DP-SGD 没必要
证明两者衡量的是同一个属性
结论是两者衡量的是不同的东西：在插入的 canary 上做 MIA 会低估记忆程度，因为 canary 并未被优化为 “最容易被抽取” 的、真正影响隐私的样本

questions.question: What does PMixED (arXiv:2403.15638) provide as an alternative to DP training?
options: A faster DP-SGD variant
A new accountant for Renyi DP
Inference-time differential privacy via a mixture of experts on next-token distributions, with aggregation noise; avoids DP training entirely
A way to compute epsilon from epsilon-delta accounting alone
questions.question_zh: PMixED（arXiv:2403.15638）作为 DP 训练的替代方案，提供的是什么？
options_zh: 更快的 DP-SGD 变体
针对 Renyi DP 的新 accountant
推理时的差分隐私：在 next-token 分布上做专家混合，并加聚合噪声；完全避开 DP 训练
仅凭 epsilon-delta accounting 就能算出 epsilon 的方法

questions.question: What is the Differential Privacy Reversal via LLM Feedback attack?
options: Using a DP-trained model's confidence scores as an oracle to re-identify individuals, even when outputs do not leak directly
An attack on tokenizer entropy
A method to reset epsilon to zero
A countermeasure to canary insertion
questions.question_zh: Differential Privacy Reversal via LLM Feedback 攻击是什么？
options_zh: 把 DP 训练后的模型的置信度分数当作 oracle，用以重新识别个体——即使输出本身没有直接泄漏
针对 tokenizer entropy 的攻击
把 epsilon 重置为零的方法
对 canary 插入的反制手段
